originalTitle: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
title: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
content: Cameroon's President Paul Biya, 93, won his eighth successive term last year in a disputed election.

originalTitle: Senegal bans ministers from foreign travel as oil price rise bites
title: Senegal bans ministers from foreign travel as oil price rise bites
content: The fuel cost is nearly double what the government budgeted for putting pressure on stretched finances.

originalTitle: 'We want a voice in our land' - the people evicted to build Nigeria's capital
title: 'We want a voice in our land' - the people evicted to build Nigeria's capital
content: People evicted to build Nigeria's capital accuse the government of failing to fulfill its promises to them.

originalTitle: Israeli measures tighten grip on Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque
title: Israeli measures tighten grip on Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque
content: Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque sees intensified control, with Israeli measures resembling policies applied at Al-Aqsa Mosque.

originalTitle: Lewandowski claims late La Liga win for Barcelona at Atletico
title: Lewandowski claims late La Liga win for Barcelona at Atletico
content: Barcelona move seven points clear of Real Madrid at the top of Spanish football's La Liga after beating Atletico 2-1.

originalTitle: Giuffre family urges UK’s King Charles to meet Epstein survivors in US
title: Giuffre family urges UK’s King Charles to meet Epstein survivors in US
content: Prior to her death, Virginia Giuffre accused Epstein of trafficking her to Charles's brother, the former Prince Andrew.

originalTitle: US and Iran trade threats to unleash 'hell' as search for missing US airman continues
title: US and Iran trade threats to unleash 'hell' as search for missing US airman continues
content: Donald Trump wants Iran to strike a deal and to open the strategic Strait of Hormuz whose closure has led to a spike in oil prices.

originalTitle: Search for missing airman presents serious test for US
title: Search for missing airman presents serious test for US
content: The stakes could rise further if the weapons system officer of the downed F15 Eagle plane is captured by Iran.

originalTitle: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
content: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

originalTitle: Liverpool's FA Cup capitulation ramps up pressure on Slot
title: Liverpool's FA Cup capitulation ramps up pressure on Slot
content: Nobody would have believed that 12 months on from Liverpool's title win, a fanbase so united behind its team and its manager would be, at best, apathetic as to whether Arne Slot remains in the job.

originalTitle: Haaland's 'old-school' lesson for Liverpool as FA Cup record falls
title: Haaland's 'old-school' lesson for Liverpool as FA Cup record falls
content: Manchester City have beaten Arsenal and taken apart Liverpool in their past two games and Erling Haaland's return to goalscoring form has laid down the gauntlet for the run-in.

originalTitle: Rohl won't watch title rivals as Rangers enjoy top spot
title: Rohl won't watch title rivals as Rangers enjoy top spot
content: As Rangers move to the top of the Scottish Premiership for the first time this season, head coach Danny Rohl is "convinced" they can finish the job.
